nasb.text: Now fifty men of the sons of the prophets went and stood opposite them at a distance, while the two of them stood by the Jordan.

esv.text: Fifty men of the sons of the prophets also went and stood at some distance from them, as they both were standing by the Jordan.

cnv.text: 先知門徒中有五十人跟著他們，遠遠地站在他們對面；他們二人在約旦河河邊站著。

ccb.text: 先知中有五十人跟他们来到约旦河，远远地站着，他们二人则站在河边。
